message:
feat(abi): add entrypoint tracing scopes to malloc family functions

Instrument all public allocator ABI functions with tracing scopes for
better observability:

malloc_abi.rs:
- malloc: Add _trace_scope for allocation requests
- free: Add _trace_scope for deallocation tracking
- calloc: Add _trace_scope for zeroed allocation
- realloc: Add _trace_scope for resize operations
- posix_memalign: Add _trace_scope for aligned allocation

runtime_policy.rs:
- Import additional types needed for trace scope implementation
- Add Cell/RefCell imports for thread-local trace state

The entrypoint_scope function creates a guard that tracks entry/exit
of each allocator function, enabling performance profiling and
debugging of the membrane's decision-making paths through the
allocation layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
